title: App Settings - General - Account - Account delete - Starting with no WiFi connection
scenario: Account deletion fails with "Unable to perform task" popup when WiFi is disconnected, then succeeds after reconnecting and using Retry on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and log into a Lens tenant account.
2. Disconnect WiFi on the mobile device.
3. Navigate to: Home → General (gear icon) → Account tab.
4. Tap 'Delete' button, then tap 'Confirm' on the confirmation dialog.
5. Observe the popup message: 'Unable to perform task...' (or similar error indicating no network).
6. Tap 'Later' on the popup to return to the Device Settings screen.
7. Repeat steps 3–4 (navigate to Account tab, tap Delete and Confirm) while WiFi remains off.
8. Verify the same 'Unable to perform task...' popup appears again.
9. Turn on WiFi on the mobile device.
10. On the popup, tap 'Retry' to attempt the account deletion again.
11. Wait for the deletion process to complete; the app should log the user out automatically.
12. Verify the user is logged out in the Poly Studio Mobile app (e.g., Login screen is shown).
13. On the cloud side (Lens admin console), verify the account has been removed.
expected: User is logged out of the app, account is deleted on the cloud side, and no errors occur when WiFi is restored and Retry is tapped.
